title: Send a variable into the app and item view!

Description
I need to send variables to my app so it can open with predefined item selected. 
Also the ability to add the app in the item view would be really useful!

posts.author: frossini (Fab Rossini)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I need to send variables to my app so it can open with predefined item selected.
Also the ability to add the app in the item view would be really useful!

What are you trying to achieve

I would like to open my app with predefined parameters!
